summary: Frontend-only re-test of BUG-1 (new baked-header.png logo in header/footer/admin) and BUG-2 (FR/EN i18n) on the public site. 79 assertions executed via Playwright; 78 passed. 1 REAL bug remains: the EN Careers headline does NOT wrap 'JOIN US.' in .text-brand-gold (only the FR 'REJOIGNEZ-NOUS.' is highlighted). Both logo bugs are FIXED. All other translation flows (nav, hero, ecosystem, why-baked, mobile-showcase phone labels, contact form, footer columns, persistence across reload, /careers page locale switching) pass in both FR and EN.

ui_bugs.issue: EN locale: the title 'WE WANT TO SHAPE THE FUTURE OF TECHNOLOGY. JOIN US.' is rendered inside a plain <span> with NO .text-brand-gold class. The inline title JSX only splits on the French phrase 'REJOIGNEZ-NOUS.', so the English phrase 'JOIN US.' is never wrapped in the gold span. A `CareersHeadline` helper + `HIGHLIGHTS = ['REJOIGNEZ-NOUS.', 'JOIN US.']` constant are defined at the top of the file (lines 8-10) but are NEVER called from the JSX. FR works (REJOIGNEZ-NOUS. is gold), EN does not.
ui_bugs.selector: [data-testid="careers-title"] .text-brand-gold (returns nothing in EN; in EN there is only a plain WE WANT TO SHAPE THE FUTURE OF TECHNOLOGY. JOIN US.)
ui_bugs.evidence:
DOM in EN:

WE WANT TO SHAPE THE FUTURE OF TECHNOLOGY. JOIN US.

. DOM in FR:

NOUS VOULONS FAÇONNER L'AVENIR DE LA TECHNOLOGIE. REJOIGNEZ-NOUS.

action_items: Replace the inline `.split('REJOIGNEZ-NOUS.')` block in Careers.tsx (lines 74-82) with a call to the already-defined `CareersHeadline` helper (or extend the inline logic to also split on 'JOIN US.'). Example: `` so that both 'REJOIGNEZ-NOUS.' (FR) and 'JOIN US.' (EN) are wrapped in ….
critical_code_review_comments: Careers.tsx defines HIGHLIGHTS = ['REJOIGNEZ-NOUS.', 'JOIN US.'] AND a CareersHeadline helper at the top of the file, but the JSX at line 74 still uses a hard-coded `.split('REJOIGNEZ-NOUS.')`. Dead code (the helper is unused) + the bug. Use the helper.

Header.tsx, Footer.tsx, AdminShell.tsx and LoginForm.tsx all correctly reference /logos/baked-header.png. Footer has exactly two instances (top column + giant centered bottom). Giant logo measured at 920px wide on 1920px viewport — exceeds the 600px requirement.
i18n provider correctly persists to localStorage key 'baked_locale' and sets document.documentElement.lang. EN/FR switching is instant (no reload). Persistence across reload verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BUG-1 (logo swap to /logos/baked-header.png) is fully fixed in Header, Footer (top + giant bottom), AdminShell sidebar, and /admin/login. BUG-2 (translations) is 98% fixed: nav, hero (title gold span CONNECTER/CONNECTING), subtitle, CTAs, ecosystem, why-baked, mobile-showcase phone labels, contact form, footer columns, footer lang label, persistence after reload, and /careers page locale switching all work in both FR and EN. The ONLY remaining issue is the EN Careers homepage section title — `JOIN US.` is not wrapped in `.text-brand-gold` because the JSX still hard-splits on the French phrase. Fix is small: swap the inline split for the existing `CareersHeadline` helper (already imported in scope).
rca of the issue: Careers.tsx contains a dead helper `CareersHeadline` (with the correct multi-phrase HIGHLIGHTS) but the JSX at lines 74-82 still uses an inline `.split('REJOIGNEZ-NOUS.')`. Because the EN translation 'WE WANT TO SHAPE THE FUTURE OF TECHNOLOGY. JOIN US.' does not contain 'REJOIGNEZ-NOUS.', the split returns a single-element array and the else branch on line 80 wraps the entire title in one plain <span>, with no .text-brand-gold child. Fix: render `<CareersHeadline text={t('careers.title')} />` instead of the inline map.
